Mouna Ramesh K

Engineering Manager • Strategic Leader • Technology Innovator

16+ years of experience scaling high-performing distributed teams and delivering enterprise SaaS solutions. Expert in remote team leadership and AI-first engineering cultures.

Experience Contact Me

Professional Experience

Manager – Software Development

Feb 2023 – Present

First American India

Leading engineering transformation for a Fortune 500 title insurance provider. Managed team scaling from 7 to 24 members while delivering 6+ critical customer-facing capabilities with zero production incidents.

  • Achieved $45K-$60K annual cost savings through infrastructure optimization and automation.
  • Championed AI-first culture through 10+ strategic POCs, reducing performance analysis time by 92%.
  • Standardized performance engineering across 10+ services and eliminated OOM incidents.

Technical Manager

Oct 2015 – Feb 2023

Happiest Minds Technologies

Led engineering delivery for Fortune 500 identity security client. Managed 7 scrum teams building privileged access management and CIAM solutions.

  • Owned complete program management lifecycle including budget (P&L) and stakeholder alignment.
  • Drove microservices architecture adoption and established observability best practices.
  • Received "Innovation and Technology Team Award" for setting benchmarks in technical excellence.

Software Developer

Apr 2009 – Oct 2015

Fidelity National Financial

Developed enterprise IoT and title insurance solutions.

  • Executed IoT projects integrating industrial devices using Azure IoT Hub and AWS IoT.
  • Built document management and contact workflows for title insurance platforms.

Core Competencies

Leadership

Remote Team Leadership, Stakeholder Management, Budgeting (P&L), OKRs/KPIs, Strategic Vendor Partnerships.

Engineering

CI/CD, Cloud Architecture (AWS/Azure), Quality Engineering, Observability (Datadog/Grafana), SRE.

Innovation

AI/ML Innovation, GenAI Adoption, Microservices, IoT, GP2, UVP.
